creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Thank you for your pr submission. We believe this was fixed in a followup version. 
We are sorry it took so long to look at this, the old maintainer is no longer available. 

Could you check your problem against current ports tree? 
PORTVERSION=	0.7.4 
PORTREVISION=	1 

If you are still having problems with this, please open a new pr, and include the version you tested. 
Thank you.
